summary: Done-lane calibration confirmed the local P0 demo path for Evidence -> Issue/Risk -> Draft Memo -> Human Review -> Gate/Audit/Eval handoff remains intact. The workspace exposes deterministic issue/risk/obligation/red-flag/open-question registers, draft memo traceability, review actions, export gate state, review log, audit trail payloads, and eval-ready records.
contractsChanged: Review log to eval-ready record derivation
testsRun: cd frontend && npx eslint src/aletheia/reviewStudio.ts src/aletheia/AletheiaWorkspace.tsx tests/reviewStudio.test.ts
cd frontend && npx playwright test tests/review-studio-demo.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts --project=desktop-chromium
risks: This slice is a local/demo Review Studio view model; persisted backend review/audit/gate rows remain owned by backend/gate/audit follow-up work.
The Playwright proof covers desktop Chromium; mobile layout is expected to render responsively but was not rerun for this new spec in this cycle.
needs: Backend/gate/audit owners can now map reviewStudioLog, reviewStudioAuditTrail, evalRecords, and reviewStudioRecords into persisted rows when schema ownership is available.
